title: Signal Tag Taxonomy
description: Controlled vocabulary of 10 signal tags for resume bullet annotation. No custom tags allowed. Referenced by validation_gates.validate_signal_tags()

tags.description: Decisions driven by metrics, A/B tests, analytics, experimentation
examples: Validated via A/B test (n=24,847, p<0.01, holdout confirmed) driving +9pp conversion
Established experimentation practice: 12 tests/quarter, 67% win rate, $2.1M ARR impact
tags.required_evidence: Must include metric, method (A/B test, cohort analysis), and outcome

tags.description: Leading PM/Eng/Design collaboration, driving alignment, establishing rituals
examples: Directed 3D/2E/1PM through quarterly roadmap prioritization (RICE); established design review rituals adopted org-wide
Facilitated weekly design reviews with 12 cross-functional stakeholders; resolved 47 handoff issues in Q3
tags.required_evidence: Must specify team composition, cadence, and measurable outcome

tags.description: Design systems, component libraries, token architecture, governance at scale
examples: Architected Design System v2 token architecture: 12 teams, 87% UI coverage, 0 breaking changes in 18mo
Built component library (240 components) in React/TypeScript; established contribution model for 50+ engineers
tags.required_evidence: Must include scale (teams, components), coverage metric, and governance model

tags.description: Production code, prototypes in code, engineering collaboration, technical decision-making
examples: Pair-programmed React/TypeScript components with 2 E5 engineers; cut handoff 3.2 days to 0.8 days
Shipped production prototypes in Storybook for 3 features; engineers adopted components without modification
tags.required_evidence: Must name specific technologies, collaboration mode, and measurable efficiency gain

tags.description: Interviews, usability tests, JTBD, synthesis leading to product decisions
examples: Established JTBD research practice: 52 interviews/year, insights logged in Dovetail, directly informed 3 product pivots
Conducted 12 usability studies (n=8 each); synthesized findings into journey maps driving Q3 roadmap reprioritization
tags.required_evidence: Must include method, sample size, tool, and traceable product impact

tags.description: WCAG audit, inclusive patterns, training, bug reduction, compliance
examples: Championed WCAG 2.2 AA compliance: audited 240 components, trained 15 engineers, reduced a11y bugs 78%
Established accessibility review gate in design system contribution pipeline; 100% of new components ship accessible
tags.required_evidence: Must include WCAG version/level, scope (components/pages), and measurable improvement

tags.description: Motion specs, edge cases, pixel-perfect, design QA, interaction detail
examples: Authored motion specification system (duration, easing, choreography) adopted by 8 product teams; reduced animation bugs 90%
Specified 47 edge cases for checkout flow (empty states, errors, loading, internationalization); zero post-launch UX bugs
tags.required_evidence: Must include specification artifact, adoption scope, and quality metric

tags.description: Defined problem, strategy from scratch, shipped v1, navigated unknown
examples: Defined 0→1 product strategy for B2B marketplace (Series A, $12M): IA, design language, component library from scratch
Shipped v1 developer platform in 6 months: defined problem space, designed API surface, built design system from zero
tags.required_evidence: Must describe initial ambiguity, strategic choices made, and v1 ship evidence

tags.description: Roadmap change, budget secured, exec memo, org process change, thought leadership
examples: Authored design strategy memo adopted by VP Product; shifted Q3 roadmap to prioritize enterprise billing ($2.1M ARR)
Secured $200K budget for design system migration through business case presented to CFO; approved unanimously
tags.required_evidence: Must name decision-maker, specific decision changed, and quantified business impact

tags.description: Mentees promoted, rituals created, hiring panels, community building, knowledge sharing
examples: Mentored 2 junior designers to promotion within 18mo; created design critique framework adopted by 8 teams
Led hiring panel for 15 designer roles; established structured interview rubric reducing bias; 40% female hires
tags.required_evidence: Must include mentee outcomes, ritual/process created, and adoption scope
